message:
fix(codegen): Fix SIGSEGV crash in hasLambdaUsingClasses

Root cause: hasLambdaUsingClasses() switch statement was missing cases
for statement types (for_stmt, while_stmt, if_stmt, try_stmt, etc.).
When recursively traversing AST nodes, it would crash on encountering
these unhandled types.

Changes:
- Add missing statement types to hasLambdaUsingClasses switch:
  - for_stmt: handle body + orelse_body (optional)
  - while_stmt: handle body + orelse_body (optional)
  - if_stmt: handle body + else_body
  - try_stmt: handle body + else_body + finalbody + handlers
  - with_stmt: handle body
  - function_def: handle body
  - class_def: handle body
  - expr_stmt: delegate to value expression

- Fix field name mismatches:
  - For/While use orelse_body (optional)
  - If uses else_body (not optional)
  - Try uses else_body and finalbody (not orelse_body/finally_body)

Impact: Fixes test_raise.py codegen crash (exit code 139 -> 0)
